recommendations.title: Father Frost
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale about a conceited young man and a young woman with a tyrannical step-mother, who must overcome magical trials in order to be together.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The NeverEnding Story

recommendations.title: Tigers Are Not Afraid
recommendations.overview: When her mother suddenly disappears with no one to care for her, young Estrella ends up on the street and joins a gang of children, triggering a dangerous and tragic chain of events.

recommendations.title: Trouble at Timpetill
recommendations.overview: The children of a small European mountain village end up being its only residents, soon after the adults cannot take their behavior any longer.

recommendations.title: The Snow Sister
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose grieving family has forgotten about Christmas forms an unexpected, healing bond with a bubbly girl full of holiday spirit.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Wheels on Meals
recommendations.overview: Cousins Thomas and David, owners of a mobile restaurant, team up with their friend Moby, a bumbling private detective, to save the beautiful Sylvia, a pickpocket.

recommendations.title: The Dukes of Hazzard: The Beginning

recommendations.title: The Little Vampire 3D
